title: CLSU Virtual Tour
tagline: Interactive 360° campus virtual exploring system for Central Luzon State University.
summary: A full-stack web-based interactive virtual tour of Central Luzon State University — my capstone project — with 100+ virtual tours, an AI chatbot, and a secure admin CMS for non-technical staff.
body: The CLSU Virtual Tour is a web-based interactive virtual exploring system that lets anyone walk the Central Luzon State University campus from a browser. Built with PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript on top of Pannellum for the 360° panoramas, it serves more than 100 virtual tours and integrates a Google Gemini AI chatbot to answer visitors' questions about the campus.

Non-technical staff manage everything through a secure admin CMS. I engineered an optimized file upload system for the panorama imagery and hardened the platform with enterprise-grade security — bcrypt password hashing, CSRF protection, and SQL injection prevention.
The system is evaluated against the ISO/IEC 25010 software quality framework and holds sub-3-second load times across the tour experience.
highlights: 100+ virtual tours with integrated AI chatbot (Google Gemini)
Enterprise-grade security: bcrypt, CSRF protection, SQL injection prevention
Sub-3-second load times, evaluated with the ISO/IEC 25010 framework

title: MAConglomo Hub
tagline: Pharmaceutical ERP & field sales management system.
summary: A centralized ERP solution for MA Conglomo MedCorp that digitized legacy paper-based tracking and gave the company real-time visibility into field sales activity.
body: MAConglomo Hub is a centralized ERP solution built for MA Conglomo MedCorp, a pharmaceutical company that was still running on paper-based tracking. Digitizing those legacy processes reduced manual data-entry errors and put inventory and sales data in one place.
I engineered the MedRep management features — daily coverage reports and pre/post-call logging — so the company can monitor real-time field activities and client engagement across its sales force.
highlights: Digitized legacy paper-based tracking, reducing manual data entry errors
MedRep daily coverage reports with pre/post-call logging
Real-time monitoring of field activities and client engagement
